iran_nuke.notes: Day 18 12:00 — CRITICAL 44. Regime claims readiness for prolonged war. Proliferation risk rising as war extends. 44 + 7 (coupling) = 51.

iran_conventional.notes: Day 18 12:00 — IMMINENT 100 (capped). Iran claims control of Hormuz, sets special passage conditions. Araghchi: ready for long war. Dubai airport fuel tank hit by drone. UK joins Hormuz effort. 50th IRGC wave. No ceasefire, no de-escalation.

israel_lebanon.notes: Day 18 12:00 — IMMINENT 101→100. Israel announces ground operations in southern Lebanon. Khiam struck 3x. 4 killed incl 2 children. Iran FM ready for long war. Dubai drone hits airport fuel tank. UK joins Hormuz coalition effort.

turkey.notes: Day 18 12:00 — IMMINENT 86. Financial Post reports Iran missiles targeted Incirlik Air Base, intercepted by USS Oscar Austin. Turkey lodged formal protest with Tehran. Narrative of NATO boundary testing intensifying. No new intercepts in past hour.

india.notes: Day 18 12:00 — ELEVATED 25. India evacuates 550 nationals from ME. Diplomatic balancing. No escalation signals.

russia.notes: Day 18 12:00 — IMMINENT 84. Ukraine offers drone expertise to Gulf states seeking to counter Iranian drones. EU extends Russia sanctions 6 months. Starmer warns of hardest decision being troop deployment. Finland nuclear hosting debate continues.

china.notes: Day 18 12:00 — CRITICAL 34 (w/coupling). Trump may delay Xi summit. China stance on Hormuz unclear. US-China friction over ME crisis.

north_korea.notes: Day 18 12:00 — IMMINENT 76. Kim Jong Un observed large-scale rocket artillery test (10+ ballistic missiles, 600mm MLRS saturation drill). TIMED right after US air defense assets redeployed from South Korea to Middle East. Strategic exploitation of security gap. 100% accuracy claimed on 364km targets. NEW SIGNAL: timing exploitation of US redeployment (+8).

russia_ukraine.notes: Day 18 12:00 — IMMINENT 100 (capped). Zelensky says ready for trilateral talks, waiting on US/Russia. Trump slams Zelensky as "far more difficult" than Putin. EU extends Ukraine sanctions 6 months. Ukraine offers drone expertise to Gulf states. Druzhba pipeline damaged. Combat continues.

pakistan_afghanistan.notes: Day 18 12:00 — IMMINENT 100 (capped). Kandahar strikes continue. 118K displaced. Deadliest phase. 100 (capped).

Israel ground ops in Lebanon expand. 850+ dead in Lebanon. Incirlik targeted. ZERO de-escalation channels. Global score 92 STABLE at IMMINENT.

latest_news.headline: DPRK fires 10+ ballistic missiles in saturation drill timed after US air defense redeployment from South Korea
latest_news.text: Kim Jong Un observed large-scale rocket artillery test (10+ ballistic missiles, 600mm MLRS) conducted immediately after US THAAD and air defense assets redeployed from South Korea to Middle East. Targets 364km away on East Sea islands. South Korea condemns as UNSC violation.

latest_news.headline: Iran tests NATO boundaries — missile targeted Incirlik Air Base, intercepted by USS Oscar Austin
latest_news.text: Iranian ballistic missile aimed at Incirlik Air Base (hosts US nuclear weapons) intercepted by NATO missile defense. Turkey lodges formal protest with Tehran. Multiple articles examining NATO boundary testing narrative.

latest_news.headline: Zelensky ready for trilateral peace talks, waiting on US and Russia to set terms
latest_news.text: Ukrainian President says ready for next round of trilateral peace talks but it's up to Washington and Moscow to agree on where and when. Trump simultaneously calls Zelensky 'far more difficult' than Putin.

latest_news.headline: Israeli attacks kill 4 in Lebanon, war enters third week — 850+ killed, 800K displaced
latest_news.text: Israeli strikes hit Sidon apartment and al-Qatrani village. 850 killed including 107 children and 32 health workers. 800K+ displaced. UN Chief Guterres calls for diplomacy, says 'no military solution.'

latest_news.headline: EU extends Russia sanctions 6 months; Ukraine offers drone expertise to Gulf states
latest_news.text: European Council extends individual Russia sanctions through September 15, 2026. Separately, Ukraine offers drone defense expertise to Middle Eastern nations defending against Iranian kamikaze drones, seeking money and technology in return.

outlook: CRITICAL DETERIORATION — Global war probability 92% (Day 18 12:00). NO de-escalation channels active. (1) IRAN CONVENTIONAL IMMINENT 100 capped: Hormuz under Iranian control. Araghchi ready for long war. Dubai airport fuel tank hit. 50th IRGC wave. (2) ISRAEL-LEBANON IMMINENT 96: Ground ops in southern Lebanon, 850+ killed, 800K displaced. War enters week 3. (3) RUSSIA-UKRAINE IMMINENT 100 capped: Zelensky ready for trilateral talks but Trump friction. EU sanctions extended. (4) PAKISTAN-AFGHANISTAN IMMINENT 100 capped: Kandahar strikes continue, 118K displaced. (5) DPRK IMMINENT 76 RISING: 10+ missiles + 600mm MLRS timed after US THAAD redeployed from SK — strategic gap exploitation. (6) RUSSIA-NATO IMMINENT 84: Incirlik targeted by Iranian missile, NATO intercept narrative intensifying. (7) TURKEY IMMINENT 86: Formal protest to Tehran over Incirlik targeting. (8) IRAN NUCLEAR CRITICAL 44: Prolonged war desperation risk. KEY NEW: DPRK exploits US security gap — fires missiles the moment air defense assets leave Korea. Strategic timing signals increased provocation intent. Turkey/NATO boundary testing by Iran escalating. Ukraine drone diplomacy to Gulf states. Trump-Zelensky friction deepens as peace talks stall.
